title: Fast Days in Judaism: When, Why, and How to Fast

sources.title: Jewish Fast Days - Days of Opportunity
key_points: List of all major fast days
Exemptions for pregnant, nursing, ill people

sources.title: Zechariah 8:19 - Four Fast Days
key_points: Fast of the fifth month (Tisha B'Av)
Fast of the seventh month (Fast of Gedaliah)
Fast of the tenth month (Asarah B'Tevet)
These will become occasions for joy when Messiah comes

fast_of_gedaliah.reason: Assassination of Gedaliah, governor of Judea

fast_of_esther.reason: Esther had the Jews fast before approaching the king

shivah_asar_btammuz.reason: Romans breached the walls of Jerusalem
